Vehicle.Parking.description: Parking-related signals for the parking-fee-service demo.

Vehicle.Parking.SessionActive.description: Adapter-managed parking session state. True when a parking session is active.

Vehicle.Command.description: Command and control signals for the parking-fee-service demo.

Vehicle.Command.Door.description: Door lock command and response signals.

Vehicle.Command.Door.Lock.description: Lock/unlock command request. JSON payload containing command_id, action (lock/unlock), and target doors.

Vehicle.Command.Door.Response.description: Command execution result. JSON payload containing command_id, status (success/failed), and optional reason.
